jm_emit_folded_at_value_site:
native const or boxed Item

span.p:
short-circuit:
eval left, jm_emit_is_truthy / js_is_nullish,
MIR_BT/BF to l_right, else MOV left

span.p:
both operands typed INT/FLOAT
AND not ** / && / || ?

span.p:
native fast path:
jm_transpile_as_native(left/right),
MIR_ADD/DADD/SUB/DMUL/DDIV/LTS/DLT...
returns RAW reg (I64 or D)

jm_call js_add / js_compare(op) / js_strict_equal...
returns boxed Item
